name: Miniature Potato Pancakes
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the potato in a strainer and run under cold water to remove starch. Shake well.
2. In a food processor or blender, chop the potato fine. Add the beaten eggs, salt, pepper, and onion; blend well.
3. Heat vegetable oil in a 10-inch skillet until it crackles.
4. Drop the batter by tablespoonful into the hot oil and fry until golden brown (about 5 minutes per side).
5. Drain on paper towels.
Once cooled, the pancakes may be frozen. Place them in a freezer-safe container, ensuring they don't overlap, and put double thickness of wax paper between each layer. Reheat on a cookie sheet at 350°F until hot and crisp.
